channel.title: Substitution-Cipher on bBG — CTF Writeups
channel.description: Recent content in Substitution-Cipher on bBG — CTF Writeups

item.title: Shuffled OX — Known-Plaintext Attack on Random Alphabet Substitution
item.description: Recover a random alphabet permutation through a known-plaintext oracle, then decrypt an encrypted flag.

item.title: Again
item.description: Break a repeating-key XOR cipher layered over a fixed S-Box substitution using per-position frequency analysis.
